hardship. Similarly add up the longitudes of the Sun, Venus
and Jupiter in the man's horoscope. If the result gives an odd
sign and an odd Amsa, the man's virility becomes evident. If
these are mixed, success also will be doubtful. Let us apply
this rule to the charts of a couple. The two charts are given
hereunder : —

Adding up (1), (3) & (4) we get
I0»-13o-49'-22*
This gives us sign Aquarius and the same in Navamsa also.
So the fecundity of the male must he adjudged to be very high.
